category_sources: Official README describes vsh as an interactive HashiCorp Vault shell and CLI tool.
source_facts.description says vsh is a HashiCorp Vault interactive shell.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses vsh.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, commands, token handling, TLS, and modes.
Official repository has a doc/commands directory linked from the README command list.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/fishi0x01/vsh; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official README topics include shell, cli, vault, repl, and vault-client.
source_facts.description identifies HashiCorp Vault shell use.
